description: The Obsidian Editing Toolbar is modified from cmenu, which provides more powerful customization settings and has many built-in editing commands to be a MS Word-like toolbar editing experience.

title: obsidian-comments
description: Add, track and easily navigate between a note's Comments

title: Reminder
description: Reminder plugin for Obsidian. This plugin adds feature to manage TODOs with reminder.

title: Image Magician
description: Supports viewing and exporting various image formats powerd by ImageMagick.

title: Advanced Tables
description: Improved table navigation, formatting, manipulation, and formulas

title: Dynamic Outline
description: Adds a customizable GitHub-like floating table of contents.

title: Open Gate
description: Embed any website to Obsidian, you have anything you need in one place. You can browse website and take notes at the same time. e.g. Ask ChatGPT and copy the answer directly to your note.

title: QuickAdd
description: Quickly add new pages or content to your vault.

title: Colored Tags
description: Colorizes tags in different colors. Colors of nested tags are mixed with the root tag to improve readability. Text color contrast is automatically matched to comply with AA level of WCAG 2.1.

title: TickTickSync
description: Sync TickTick tasks to Obsidian, and Obsidian tasks to TickTick

title: enhanced-symbols-prettifier
description: Replace/substitute the symbols with actual symbols you commonly type. It also works for emojis shortcuts, abbreviations, greek letters, math symbols or other snippets/aliases you define

title: Columns
description: Allows you to create columns in Obsidian Markdown

title: Automatic List Management
description: Automatically renumber numbered lists as you edit them.

title: Vault Explorer
description: Explore your vault in visual format

title: Virtual Linker / Glossary
description: Automatically creates virtual links for text within your notes that match the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault. Create a glossary-like functionality, show unlinked mentions and transform them to real links.

title: Sidebar Highlights
description: View and manage text highlights, comments on highlights, native comments, and collections for your highlights.

title: Refresh Any View
description: Allows to refresh preview mode without reopening the note

title: Vault Full Statistics
description: Status bar item with vault full statistics such as number of notes, files, attachments, links, tags and quality of vault.

title: Optimize Canvas Connections
description: An Obsidian plugin that declutters a canvas by reconnecting notes using their nearest edges.

title: Tasks Calendar Wrapper
description: This is a simple wrapper for Obsidian-Tasks-Calendar (https://github.com/702573N/Obsidian-Tasks-Calendar) and Obsidian-Tasks-Timeline (https://github.com/702573N/Obsidian-Tasks-Timeline).

title: QuickAdd
description: Quickly add new pages or content to your vault.

title: Another Quick Switcher
description: This is an Obsidian plugin which is another choice of Quick switcher.

title: Image Captions
description: Adds captions to images when there is alt-text specified

title: Vault Transfer
description: Copies a note, and pastes it into another vault.

title: Print
description: Print notes and documents directly from your workspace.

title: Collapsible Code Blocks
description: Makes code blocks collapsible in reader view and edit view as well as enabling scroll-able code blocks.

title: Quick Links
description: Create quick link shortcuts to Wikipedia and other sites

title: Quick Explorer
description: Perform file explorer operations (and see your current file path) from the title bar, using the mouse or keyboard

title: BRAT
description: Easily install a beta version of a plugin for testing.

title: Keyboard Analyzer
description: See and analyse your keyboard hotkeys and shortcuts

title: Spotify Link
description: Include the song you're currently listening to in your note.

title: Typing Transformer
description: Improved, configurable auto formatting as typing

title: Vision Recall
description: Transform screenshots into searchable notes using AI vision and text analysis.

title: Datepicker
description: Use a date picker to modify and insert date/time anywhere in your markdown notes.

title: Automatic Table Of Contents
description: Create a table of contents in a note, that updates itself when the note changes

title: TickTickSync
description: Sync TickTick tasks to Obsidian, and Obsidian tasks to TickTick

title: Custom Font Loader
description: Customize your Obsidian vault with any font you want (+ Support for Android and IOS)

title: dbfolder
description: Folder with the capability to store and retrieve data from a folder like database

title: Colored Tags Wrangler
description: Assign colors to tags. Has integrations with other plugins, like Kanban.

title: Handwritten Notes
description: Annotate PDFs and create handwritten notes inside your vault using a stylus.

title: Mesh AI
description: Mesh AI prompt manager and gererator

title: Longform
description: Write novels, screenplays, and other long projects in Obsidian.

title: File Tree Alternative
description: This plugin allows you to have an alternative file tree view.

title: Obsius Publish
description: Make single notes instantly available on the web.

title: cMenu
description: cMenu is a plugin that adds a minimal text editor modal for a smoother writing/editing experience ✍🏽.

title: React Components
description: This is a plugin for Obsidian. It allows you to write and use React components with Jsx inside your Obsidian notes.

title: Juggl
description: Adds a completely interactive, stylable and expandable graph view to Obsidian.

title: Pandoc Plugin
description: This is a Pandoc export plugin for Obsidian. It provides commands to export to formats like DOCX, ePub and PDF.

title: Quick Switcher++
description: Enhanced Quick Switcher, search open panels, and symbols.

title: Link Favicons
description: See the favicon for a linked website.

title: Edit History
description: Automatically saves the history of edits of a file when Obsidian saves the file, and allows viewing the differences between edits, copying text from a previous edit, or fully rolling back to a previous edit.

title: Reminder
description: Reminder plugin for Obsidian. This plugin adds feature to manage TODOs with reminder.

title: Auto Hide
description: Collapse sidebars when clicking on the editor/viewer panel

title: Better Markdown Links
description: Adds support for angle bracket links and manages relative links properly

title: Git
description: Integrate Git version control with automatic backup and other advanced features.

title: Default New Tab Page
description: Open a note of your choice when creating a new tab, like in the browser.

title: Import Attachments+
description: Move and link the attachments into the vault.

title: Lazy Plugin Loader
description: Load plugins with a delay on startup, so that you can get your app startup down into the sub-second loading time.

title: Self-hosted LiveSync
description: Community implementation of self-hosted livesync. Reflect your vault changes to some other devices immediately. Please make sure to disable other synchronize solutions to avoid content corruption or duplication.

title: Quick Explorer
description: Perform file explorer operations (and see your current file path) from the title bar, using the mouse or keyboard

title: Time Ruler
description: A drag-and-drop time ruler combining the best of a task list and a calendar view (integrates with Tasks, Full Calendar, and Dataview).

title: Icon Shortcodes
description: Insert emoji and custom icons with shortcodes

title: CustomJS
description: This plugin lets you use custom javascript files inside your vault.

title: Floating Search
description: You can use search view in modal/leaf/popout window now.

title: Omnisearch
description: A search engine that just works

title: @ Symbol Linking
description: Adds ability to link with @ (the At Symbol) in Obsidian. Can limit @ linking to specific folders e.g. People/

title: Image Gallery
description: A zero setup masonry image gallery for Obsidian

title: Janitor
description: Performs cleanup tasks on the Obsidian vault

title: Background Image
description: This allows you to specify a remote URL as the background image, and a few settings to tweak the experience.

title: Jump to link
description: This plugin allows open a link in current document or regex based navigation in editor mode using hotkey

title: Advanced Canvas
description: Supercharge your canvas experience! Create presentations, flowcharts and more!

description: Show control/non-printing characters in edit mode

title: Tag Summary
description: This plugin creates summaries with paragraphs or blocks of text that share the same tag(s).

title: Explorer Colors
description: Set custom colors for files and folders.

description: Adds ability to link with any trigger. Each trigger can limit linking to specific folders or file.

title: File Include
description: Include or embed files in Obsidian markdown.

title: File Cleaner Redux
description: Help you to clean empty files and unused attachments in the vault.

description: Quickly add new pages or content to your vault.

title: Advanced Cursors
description: Use multiple cursors even more powerfully.

description: Translate text and notes with Google Translate, DeepL, Azure, and more.

description: Sync TickTick tasks to Obsidian, and Obsidian tasks to TickTick

description: Explore your vault in visual format

description: Analyze images with AI to get keywords of the image.

description: Allows to refresh preview mode without reopening the note

description: Add zoom and drag functionality to diagrams from Mermaid, Plantuml, Graphviz, Gravizo and so on

description: Create notes within folders that can be accessed without collapsing the folder, similar to the functionality offered in Notion.

description: Allows adding personal comments to each installed plugin.

description: View Images, Transclusions, iFrames and PDF Files within the Editor without a necessity to switch to Preview.

description: Create a curated list of important tags to serve as meaningful entry points to your knowledge base.

title: Git
description: Integrate Git version control with automatic backup and other advanced features.

title: historica
description: Intelligently generates timeline from your content ... like a bro!

title: Ink
description: Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes using a digital pen, stylus, or Apple pencil. Useful for handwriting, sketches, scribbles, or even math equations and scientific notation. Runs on the tldraw framework and drawing provides an infinite canvas.

title: Strange New Worlds
description: Help see how your vault is interconnected with visual indicators.

title: Color Palette
description: Create and insert color palettes into your notes.

title: HTML Reader
description: This is a HTML file reader plugin for Obsidian. Can open document with ".html" and ".htm" file extensions.

title: Auto Link Title
description: This plugin automatically fetches the titles of links from the web

title: File Order
description: Use number-prefixes in your file names to define a custom order, and drag-and-drop the files to update that order

title: Strange New Worlds
description: Help see how your vault is interconnected with visual indicators.

title: Highlightr
description: A minimal and aesthetically pleasing highlighting menu that makes color-coded highlighting much easier with a configurable assortment of highlight colors 🎨.

title: Remember File State
description: Remembers cursor position, selection, scrolling, and more for each file

title: Pixel Banner
description: Apply an image from various sources as a banner to your notes.

description: Automatically analyze note content and add relevant tags using AI

title: Execute Code

title: obsidian-bartender
description: Allows for rearranging the elements in the status bar and sidebar ribbon

description: Tools for efficiently folding markdown sections in Obsidian

title: Local Images Plus
description: Local Images Plus plugin searches for all external media links in your notes, downloads and saves them locally and adjusts the links in your notes to point to the saved files.
